name: Framer-motion via LazyMotion strict + domAnimation + m proxy
description: Phase 5 motion layer (warren-5da1 / pl-55a3 step 6): src/ui/src/components/ui/motion.tsx imports framer-motion through LazyMotion strict mode with only the domAnimation feature bundle and uses the m proxy (NOT the full motion proxy). This caps the bundle to the opacity/transform subset Phase 5 actually uses (skip drag/layout/SVG features) — measured 582917 raw / 171707 gzip JS after wiring up MotionProvider at the app root, StreamItem+AnimatePresence{initial:false} per EventLine in RunDetail, and StaggerList/FadeInItem on Runs FilterPills. Strict mode also throws on any accidental motion.* import so future phases cannot silently expand the feature surface. Wrap children as <m.div> — props typed via HTMLMotionProps<'div'> to avoid React's onDrag colliding with framer-motion's PanInfo handler. MotionConfig reducedMotion='user' at the app root means every motion descendant respects prefers-reduced-motion natively — no per-component motion-safe: gating needed.

content: Streaming-list animation pattern: wrap the per-item component in a framer-motion StreamItem (m.div with FADE_IN variants initial=hidden->visible) and the list parent in <AnimatePresence initial={false}>. initial=false suppresses entry animation for items present at first render (historical NDJSON replay in RunDetail) so only newly appended items animate in. Avoids the jarring 'animate every existing event' first paint while still giving the live tail a fade+rise affordance.

name: responsive-contract-tokens
description: Canonical responsive contract lives in src/ui/src/components/ui/responsive.ts (warren-3315 / pl-dfb5 step 5): mobile-first, base utilities target 360-393px phones, Tailwind sm: (640) is the desktop cutover. Exports breakpoint constants (PHONE_MIN=360, PHONE_MAX=393, SM_BREAKPOINT=640) plus reusable class-name tokens so pages stop re-typing ad-hoc strings: responsiveTable.cellNoWrap/cellTruncate (wide-table-on-mobile: Table already wraps overflow-auto, cells stay whitespace-nowrap for clean horizontal scroll, wide free-text caps max-w-[16rem] truncate), responsiveCardHeaderRow, responsiveTrailingControl (w-full sm:ml-auto sm:w-auto), responsiveFormControl (h-11 text-base sm:h-9 sm:text-sm — 44px touch + 16px to kill iOS zoom), responsiveFooterActions/responsiveFooterButton. Documented in src/ui/README.md. Step 6 (warren-42ba) applies these tokens across all pages.
